criteria.name: User Ratings
criteria.description: Average rating of the app on major app stores like Google Play and Apple App Store.
criteria.sources: Google Play Store, Apple App Store

criteria.name: Downloads
criteria.description: Total number of downloads of the app across major app stores.
criteria.sources: Google Play Store, Apple App Store, Sensor Tower

criteria.name: AI Integration
criteria.description: Level and effectiveness of AI integration in the app for features like budgeting, savings, and investment recommendations.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, tech blogs

criteria.name: Feature Set
criteria.description: Range and depth of features offered by the app, including budgeting, tracking expenses, investment options, and financial advice.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, tech blogs

criteria.name: User Interface
criteria.description: Ease of use and intuitiveness of the app's user interface.
criteria.sources: User reviews, tech blogs, app screenshots

criteria.name: Security
criteria.description: Security measures implemented by the app to protect user data and financial information.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, security audits, user reviews

criteria.name: Customer Support
criteria.description: Quality and responsiveness of the app's customer support.
criteria.sources: User reviews, tech blogs, customer support ratings

criteria.name: Innovation
criteria.description: Innovative features or approaches that set the app apart from competitors.
criteria.sources: Tech blogs, app descriptions, user reviews
